reason: Previous results used results/output.csv as gt_positions — circular: the filter was scored against the same detector output it smooths. This produces tautologically low RMSE (~0.001 m) for all configs because z_world is construction-imposed constant (ground-plane ray + H/2) and x/y barely vary on a near-stationary bin. Not a valid accuracy metric.

config_in_use.note: Runtime defaults. Re-run jitter-based analysis to tune empirically.
